name: detections
title: Detections
description: Table with detections derived from the media files. Associated with deployments (`deploymentID`). Detections can mark non-animal events (camera setup, human, blank) or one or more animal detections (`detectionType` = `animal`) of a certain taxon, count, life stage, sex, behavior and/or individual. detections can be made at different levels (`detectionLevel`). The purpose of this table is to show the history of annotating resources and to enable comparison of different detection methods. detections do not need to be mutually exclusive: multiple detections of a certain taxon, count, life stage, sex, behavior and/or individual per one media resource or event are allowed.

fields.name: detectionID
fields.description: Unique identifier of the detection.

fields.name: detectionsourceID
fields.description: Identifier of a previous detection used as input, providing the provenance of detections made by either machines or humans. If a source detection is given, this indicates that verification of a previous detection has taken place.

fields.name: observationID
fields.description: Unique identifier of the (consensus) observation the detection belongs to. Foreign key to `observations.observationID`.

fields.name: deploymentID
fields.description: Identifier of the deployment the detection belongs to. Foreign key to `deployments.deploymentID`.

fields.name: mediaID
fields.description: Identifier of the media file that was classified. Only applicable for media-based detections (`detectionLevel` = `media`). Foreign key to `media.mediaID`.

fields.name: eventID
fields.description: Identifier of the event the detection belongs to. Facilitates linking event-based and media-based detections with a permanent identifier.

fields.name: eventStart
fields.description: Date and time at which the event started. Formatted as an ISO 8601 string with timezone designator (`YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ` or `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss±hh:mm`).

fields.name: eventEnd
fields.description: Date and time at which the event ended. Formatted as an ISO 8601 string with timezone designator (`YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ` or `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss±hh:mm`).

fields.name: detectionLevel
fields.description: Level at which the detection was classified. `media` for media-based detections that are directly associated with a media file (`mediaID`). `event` for event-based detections that consider an event (comprising a collection of media files). These are especially useful for ecological research and should be mutually exclusive, so that their `count` can be summed.

fields.name: detectionType
fields.description: Type of the detection. All categories in this vocabulary have to be understandable from an AI point of view. `unknown` describes classifications with a `classificationProbability` below some predefined threshold i.e. neither humans nor AI can say what was recorded.

fields.name: cameraSetupType
fields.description: Type of the camera setup action (if any) associated with the detection.

fields.name: scientificName
fields.description: Scientific name of the detected individual(s).

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of detected individuals (optionally of given life stage, sex and behavior).

fields.name: lifeStage
fields.description: Age class or life stage of the detected individual(s).

fields.name: sex
fields.description: Sex of the detected individual(s)

fields.name: behavior
fields.description: Dominant behavior of the detected individual(s), preferably expressed as controlled values (e.g. grazing, browsing, rooting, vigilance, running, walking). Formatted as a pipe (`|`) separated list for multiple values, with the dominant behavior listed first.

fields.name: individualID
fields.description: Identifier of the detected individual.

fields.name: individualPositionRadius
fields.description: Distance from the camera to the detected individual identified by `individualID`. Expressed in meters. Required for distance analyses (e.g. [Howe et al. 2017](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.12790)) and random encounter modelling (e.g. [Rowcliffe et al. 2011](https://doi.org/10.1111/j.2041-210X.2011.00094.x)).

fields.name: individualPositionAngle
fields.description: Angular distance from the camera view centerline to the detected individual identified by `individualID`. Expressed in degrees, with negative values left, `0` straight ahead and positive values right. Required for distance analyses (e.g. [Howe et al. 2017](https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.12790)) and random encounter modelling (e.g. [Rowcliffe et al. 2011](https://doi.org/10.1111/j.2041-210X.2011.00094.x)).

fields.name: individualSpeed
fields.description: Average movement speed of the detected individual identified by `individualID`. Expressed in meters per second. Required for random encounter modelling (e.g. [Rowcliffe et al. 2016](https://doi.org/10.1002/rse2.17)).

fields.name: bboxX
fields.description: Horizontal position of the top-left corner of a bounding box that encompasses the detected individual(s) in the media file identified by `mediaID`. Or the horizontal position of an object in that media file. Measured from the left and relative to media file width.

fields.name: bboxY
fields.description: Vertical position of the top-left corner of a bounding box that encompasses the detected individual(s) in the media file identified by `mediaID`. Or the vertical position of an object in that media file. Measured from the top and relative to the media file height.

fields.name: bboxWidth
fields.description: Width of a bounding box that encompasses the detected individual(s) in the media file identified by `mediaID`. Measured from the left of the bounding box and relative to the media file width.

fields.name: bboxHeight
fields.description: Height of the bounding box that encompasses the detected individual(s) in the media file identified by `mediaID`. Measured from the top of the bounding box and relative to the media file height.

fields.name: classificationMethod
fields.description: Method (most recently) used to classify the detection.

fields.name: classifiedBy
fields.description: Name or identifier of the person or AI algorithm that (most recently) classified the detection.

fields.name: modelID
fields.description: Unique identifier of the model used for the detection. Foreign key to `models.modelID`.

fields.name: classificationTimestamp
fields.description: Date and time of the (most recent) classification. Formatted as an ISO 8601 string with timezone designator (`YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ` or `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss±hh:mm`).

fields.name: classificationProbability
fields.description: Degree of certainty of the (most recent) classification. Expressed as a probability, with `1` being maximum certainty. Omit or provide an approximate probability for human classifications.

fields.name: detectionTags
fields.description: Tag(s) associated with the detection. Formatted as a pipe (`|`) separated list for multiple values, with values optionally formatted as `key:value` pairs.

fields.name: detectionComments
fields.description: Comments or notes about the detection.
